name: The Adventures of Sam Carlisle: The Hunt for the Lost Treasure
short_description: My name is Sam. Sam Carlisle. I have a normal life. A life that I really enjoy. It is simple really. I go to work, come home and work on a secret project. A project that will make me millions. A lost treasure. A treasure too big for one man, one man alone.
detailed_description:
100 Levels

A 100 handcrafted levels is designed for this game


10 Different Game Mechanics

With 10 Chapters in the game, each chapter has different game mechanics.


Full XBox Controller support

With great experiences in this game, if you play with an XBox controller you will get an expiernce of a life time. Then you will feel Sam's pain


About the Game

The Adventures of Sam Carlisle: The Hunt for the Lost Treasure is a 2D Puzzle Platformer that will take you on an adventure of a lifetime. Meet Sam Carlisle. He has a normal life, a life that he really enjoys. He is working on a secret project. A project that will make him millions. A lost treasure. But this treasure was stolen from him. Help Sam to get it back through beautifully crafted worlds. The environment and other entities are your enemies. Sam doesn't have any powers or weapons. With Sam not having any powers, abilities or even weapons he can only move up, down, left and right. The world is Sam's enemy. But the gameplay will make the Player better and not Sam. Ther are 10 different game mechanics to help or make Sam's life a bit more difficult. The game is designded for Left and right handed people with great XBox controller support
